SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Set For Trial On Sep-17-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 210

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Continued To Sep-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:45am
Judge Samuel K. Feng, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 210:
Cause called for small claims appeal. Appellant, Marky Quayle, appears in Pro Per; Respondents, Lauren De Remer and Ashley West, appear through counsel, Nicole De Remer Kontrabecki. (Note: Ms. Kontrabecke's status is "inactive", so she was not added to the case as attorney of record.) Witnesses were sworn.
Parties present their respective cases in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Feng. Ms. Quayle calls Leo Quayle, previously sworn, testifies.
Evidence is viewed by Judge Feng, but not retained by the Court.
12:00pm
The matter is submitted, Judge Feng retains Respondent's exhibits.

Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Continued To Sep-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
